signals.raw:
COOPER FLAGG OVERTAKES KON KNUEPPEL IN ROOKIE OF THE YEAR ODDS | YES | HIGH confidence**

Cooper Flagg passed Kon Knueppel as the favorite for NBA Rookie of the Year after scoring 96 points across two games (51 points vs. Orlando Magic, 45 points vs. Los Angeles Lakers).[1][2] His odds shifted to -250 compared to Knueppel's +180.[1]
